name: CenterCalculus
summary: Class to calculate the center of an object

methods.name: Calculate
methods.signature: Calculate(line: Line2D) -> tuple | Calculate(line: Line3D) -> tuple | Calculate(polyline: Polyline2D, edge: int) -> tuple | Calculate(polyline: Polyline3D, edge: int) -> tuple | Calculate(polygon: Polygon2D, bPlaneCenter: bool, edge: int) -> tuple | Calculate(polygon: Polygon3D, bPlaneCenter: bool, edge: int) -> tuple | Calculate(arc: Arc2D, center: bool) -> tuple | Calculate(arc: Arc3D, center: bool) -> tuple | Calculate(spline: Spline2D, eps: float) -> tuple | Calculate(spline: Spline3D, eps: float) -> tuple | Calculate(spline: BSpline3D, eps: float, bAreaCenter: bool) -> tuple | Calculate(spline: BSpline2D, eps: float) -> tuple | Calculate(clothoid: Clothoid2D, eps: float) -> tuple | Calculate(path: Path2D, eps: float, bAreaCenter: bool) -> tuple | Calculate(path: Path3D, eps: float, bAreaCenter: bool) -> tuple | Calculate(geoObject: object, eps: float, bArcCenter: bool, edge: int) -> tuple
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a 2D line
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a 2D line

params.name: line
params.doc: Line2D on which to calculate the center

returns.doc: True when calculation was successful. False otherwise
